title: DuckDB-side feature polygon classification
description: Move _should_be_polygon() logic into SQL CASE expression via _build_polygon_case_sql() helper. Update way polygon detection query in _read_pbf_features_duckdb. Remove Python-side polygon refinement from _create_gdf_from_dfs. Add validation test comparing SQL vs Python classification.

title: Vectorized graph construction
description: Replace itertuples() loop in _create_graph_from_dfs with bulk edge list construction. Extract columns as numpy arrays, deduplicate consecutive nodes, build all (u,v) edge pairs, single G.add_edges_from() call. Create tests/test_vectorized_graph.py.

title: Arrow pipeline in PBF reader
description: Switch _read_pbf_network_duckdb and _read_pbf_features_duckdb from fetchdf() to fetch_arrow_table(). Return pyarrow.Table instead of pd.DataFrame. Update graph._create_graph_from_dfs and features._create_gdf_from_dfs to accept Arrow tables (convert to pandas at top of function for now). Create tests/test_arrow_pipeline.py.
close_reason: Arrow pipeline implemented: replaced all fetchdf() calls with to_arrow_table() in _pbf_reader.py, updated return types to pa.Table, updated graph._create_graph_from_dfs and features._create_gdf_from_dfs to accept pa.Table with isinstance conversion to pandas. Created tests/test_arrow_pipeline.py with 3 tests. All 21 tests pass. Committed as fa674091.

title: Benchmark suite
description: Create benchmarks/bench_pipeline.py measuring each pipeline stage (duckdb_query, graph_build, graph_simplify, features_gdf, distance_calc, end_to_end) at 3 scales using Berlin PBF. Add just bench recipe. Establishes baseline before optimization.
close_reason: Benchmark suite created and verified. benchmarks/bench_pipeline.py measures 6 pipeline stages (duckdb_query_network, graph_build, graph_simplify, distance_calc, duckdb_query_features, features_gdf, end_to_end_graph) at 3 scales (small/medium/large) using Berlin PBF. justfile updated with bench recipe. Baseline results captured: small scale ~7s total, medium ~63s, large ~870s. Committed as c0a2e056.

title: ducknx performance optimization
description: Arrow pipeline, vectorized graph construction, DuckDB-side feature logic, rustworkx opt-in backend. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-21-ducknx-performance-design.md

title: Final verification and cleanup
description: Run linter, type checker, full test suite, benchmarks. Compare benchmark results against baseline. Fix any issues. Commit cleanup.

title: Distance vectorization
description: Replace list comprehension in distance.add_edge_lengths (line 218) with numpy array indexing. Build u_arr/v_arr arrays, use np.column_stack for coordinate extraction. Add test for edge length correctness.

title: rustworkx opt-in backend
description: Add backend='rustworkx' parameter to graph_from_* functions. Implement _create_graph_rustworkx building rx.PyDiGraph with batch insertion. Add rustworkx_to_networkx() in convert.py. Add rustworkx>=0.15 as optional dep in pyproject.toml [fast] extra. Create tests/test_rustworkx_backend.py.

title: Final Verification and Cleanup
description: Run pre-commit hooks on all files, run complete test suite, verify no stale references to requests in active code, verify _polygon_to_wkt is fully removed, commit any lint/type fixes.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 6 of 6. Depends on all previous tasks.

title: Vectorize _create_gdf_from_dfs in features.py
description: Replace row-by-row iteration in _create_gdf_from_dfs with vectorized shapely.from_wkb and pandas operations. Add import shapely. Write tests in tests/test_features_vectorized.py.

title: Migrate _nominatim.py to httpx
description: Replace import requests with import httpx in _nominatim.py. Change requests.Request to httpx.Request for cache key prep. Change requests.get to httpx.get. Change response.reason to response.reason_phrase.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 4 of 6. Depends on Task 3.

title: Fix _http.py Bugs and Migrate to httpx
description: Fix type annotations in _http.py: change requests.Response to httpx.Response, add missing JSONDecodeError import, change response.reason to response.reason_phrase, change response.ok to response.is_success. Write tests in tests/test_http.py.

title: Integrate Connection Manager into _pbf_reader.py
description: Refactor _pbf_reader.py to use _duckdb.get_connection() instead of creating connections inline. Extract _build_tag_filter with SQL escaping. Inline _polygon_to_wkt as polygon.wkt. Add DROP TABLE IF EXISTS for temp tables. Remove redundant FileNotFoundError checks. Write tests in tests/test_pbf_reader.py.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 2 of 6. Depends on Task 1.

title: Create _duckdb.py Connection Manager
description: Create ducknx/_duckdb.py with connection lifecycle manager and SQL escaping. Write tests in tests/test_duckdb.py. Connection manager caches DuckDB connections per PBF path, handles spatial extension loading, and provides _escape_sql helper.

title: ducknx-cleanup
description: Workflow epic for: Fix bugs, harden SQL, standardize on httpx, add DuckDB connection reuse, and vectorize DataFrame processing in ducknx.

value: Completed workflow 'ducknx-cleanup' on 2026-04-18. 6 tasks. Key outcome: DuckDB connection reuse, SQL escaping, httpx migration, vectorized GDF construction. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-design.md.
Workflow 'ducknx-cleanup': worktree agents failed repeatedly — implementing directly was more reliable. DataFrame.pop() doesn't accept default arg. shapely.from_wkb returns numpy array not Series.
